title: CBC specimen collected
description: Peripheral blood specimen collected for CBC and differential.

title: Urine specimen collected
description: Clean-catch urine specimen collected for urinalysis.

title: CBC showed leukopenia, thrombocytopenia, anemia
description: Same-panel laboratory results documented leukopenia, thrombocytopenia, and anemia.

title: Critical lab values verbally reported
description: Platelet count and lactate were verbally read back to the RN.

title: Elevated lactate result
description: Lactate was markedly elevated on blood testing.

title: Peripheral smear showed anisopoikilocytosis and target cells
description: Smear review reported anisopoikilocytosis with target cells.

title: Potassium result may be falsely elevated
description: Laboratory comment stated potassium may be falsely elevated because of hemolysis.

title: Respiratory viral PCR negative
description: Respiratory viral PCR was final and showed adenovirus not detected, influenza A/B negative, and RSV negative.

title: Urinalysis showed positive nitrite, positive leukocyte esterase, proteinuria
description: Urinalysis showed positive nitrite and positive leukocyte esterase. Protein was present.
